text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um, Urara... About those cookies I<n>promised
you today...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, are they done already? Can I have<n>one now?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no! You can't! I accidentally mixed up<n>the sugar
and the salt when making<n>them...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, I know you were really looking<n>forward
to those cookies... I'm the worst<n>friend ever...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wait, salty cookies?! That sounds great!<n>I wanna
eat 'em!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! B-but they won't be sweet at all.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But salty snacks after exercising are the<n>best! I'm
sure your cookies will be good<n>too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'll come by to pick 'em up later, okay?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really... Thank you so, so much...
